title: Book Review: 'Avoid Boring People' by James D. Watson
summary: Andrew Brown reviewed James D. Watson's latest book Avoid Boring People: Lessons from a Life In Science. Dr. Watson dedicated the book to Paul Doty, the Founder and Director Emeritus of the Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs.
body: Andrew Brown reviewed James D. Watson's latest book Avoid Boring People: Lessons from a Life In Science. Dr. Watson dedicated the book to Paul Doty, the Founder and Director Emeritus of the Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs.
